title: StreamDC
body:
Okay. This is a simple lightweight mod for server and client to track deaths.

But why "For Streamers" you'd ask? Because every time you die in Minecraft, you'll get a file named **<World_Name>_deathcounter.txt** in current instance directory, which contains only one value - your current death count on **<World_Name>** save. If you're on a server, **<World_Name>** will be replaced with whatever you typed in "Server Address". So, you can easily put the contents of this file on your stream as overlay.

 

You can also use "**/dc**" command to get the "Top 5" deaths on a server, or run it like "**/dc set <deaths>**" to set your current death count.

 

If you'll decide to install this mod, keep in mind - it required both on client and server.
